Script.string: After you defeated them, these Archdevas
Created cursed creatures to raise their power,
And used us as scapegoats to prevail in dark magic.
Archdevas kidnap innocent victims to proceed unmentionable experiments
To create even more horrible and powerful monsters…!
Yet, to those cruel demons, we were nothing but insects to step on. I had to watch my family and comrades die.
Our tears fill the goblet of hatred,
Our blood burns as raging flame.
Behind all this pain is Archdeva, and Durion, their lord.
I will… I will defeat them at all cost.
